title: RS Rings and Tanks
description: Item absorption rings can bind to RS network, and XP pumps
body:
# 概述

RS Ring 是一个Minecraft 1.12.2 版本模组，为玩家提供了强大的物品吸收、销毁和经验管理能力

代码 95% 由 AI 构成

## 新增物品
物品吸收戒指；
- 自动吸收：在设定范围内自动吸收物品到容器、精致存储网络、实用背包、放置或穿戴的可穿戴背包；
- 黑白名单系统：支持物品ID、模组、属性三种过滤模式；耐久度/NBT匹配；
- 能量管理：基于能量系统运行，可配置能量消耗；可以手摇发电、移动发电；
- 吸收范围/间隔：可调整的吸收半径，适应不同场景需求；可控制物品吸收的频率；
- 销毁模式：可选绑定垃圾箱，自动销毁指定物品。

经验储罐系列：
- 多级储罐：提供玩家等级为100 级、500 级、1000 级和、2000 级和10000 级多种容量选择；
- 经验抽取：自动从周围吸收经验值[icon:exp]、附魔之瓶；
- 经验瓶转换：将多余经验转换为经验瓶；
- 经验修补：可自动修补玩家的经验修补附魔装备；
- 溢出处理：当储罐满时自动生成经验瓶。

经验泵控制器：
- 远程控制：在设定范围内控制多个经验储罐；
- 集中管理：统一管理经验流动和分配。
- 智能存取：全部存入/取出，存取N级；

## 可配置选项
- 吸收戒指设置：调整吸收范围、能量消耗、过滤模式、严格模式、默认黑白名单等；
- 背包模组兼容设置：开关、优先度、级联等；
- 经验储罐设置：配置经验抽取速率、范围、修补模式等；
- 控制器设置：调整控制器控制的储罐个数。

## 模组兼容
- [Trinkets and Baubles](https://modrinth.com/mod/trinkets-and-baubles) - 饰品栏
- [Useful Backpacks](https://modrinth.com/mod/useful-backpacks) - 实用背包
- [Wearable Backpacks](https://modrinth.com/mod/wearablebackpacks) - 可穿戴背包
- [Wearable Backpacks: RLCraft Edition](https://modrinth.com/mod/wearable-backpacks-rlcraft-edition) - 可穿戴背包-RLCraft版
- [Refined Storage](https://modrinth.com/mod/refined-storage) - 精致存储

# Overview

RS Ring is a Minecraft 1.12.2 mod that provides players with powerful item absorption, destruction, and experience management capabilities.

95% of the code is AI-generated.

## New Items
Item Absorb Ring:
- Auto Absorption: Automatically absorbs items within a set range into containers, Refined Storage networks, Useful-Backpacks, placed or worn WearableBackpacks.
- Blacklist/Whitelist System: Supports three filtering modes by Item ID, Mod, and Attributes; Durability/NBT matching.
- Energy Management: Operates on an energy system with configurable energy consumption; Can generate power by manual charging or movement.
- Absorption Range/Interval: Adjustable absorption radius to suit different scenarios; Control the frequency of item absorption.
- Destroy Mode: Optional trash can binding to automatically destroy specified items.

Experience Tank Series:
- Multi-level Tanks: Multiple capacity options for player levels of 100, 500, 1000, 2000, and 10000.
- XP Extraction: Automatically absorbs experience orbs and XP bottles from the surroundings.
- XP to Bottle Conversion: Converts excess experience into XP bottles.
- Mending: Automatically repairs player's Mending enchanted equipment.
- Overflow Handling: Automatically generates XP bottles when the tank is full.

Experience Pump Controller:
- Remote Control: Controls multiple experience tanks within a set range.
- Centralized Management: Unified management of experience flow and distribution.
- Smart Access: Store/Withdraw all, Store/Withdraw N levels.

## Configurable Options
- Absorb Ring Settings: Adjust absorption range, energy cost per item, filtering mode, strict mode, default blacklist/whitelist, etc.
- Mod Compatibility Settings: Toggle, priority, cascade, etc.
- Experience Tank Settings: Configure XP extraction rate, range, mending mode, etc.
- Controller Settings: Adjust the maximum managed tanks.

## Mod Compatibility
- [Trinkets and Baubles](https://modrinth.com/mod/trinkets-and-baubles) - Baubles Slot
- [Useful Backpacks](https://modrinth.com/mod/useful-backpacks) - Useful-Backpacks
- [Wearable Backpacks](https://modrinth.com/mod/wearablebackpacks) - WearableBackpacks
- [Wearable Backpacks: RLCraft Edition](https://modrinth.com/mod/wearable-backpacks-rlcraft-edition) - WearableBackpacks - RLCraft Edition
- [Refined Storage](https://modrinth.com/mod/refined-storage) - Refined Storage
